name: Project Management
summary: Planning, coordinating and delivering technical projects from initiation through to operational handover.

name: Programme Management
summary: Coordinating multiple related projects to achieve strategic business and technology outcomes.

name: Project Leadership
summary: Providing technical leadership, governance and direction to multidisciplinary delivery teams.

name: Stakeholder Management
summary: Building trusted relationships with business, technical and executive stakeholders to support successful delivery.

name: Vendor Management
summary: Managing supplier relationships, contracts and collaborative delivery with external technology partners.

name: Business Analysis
summary: Understanding business needs and translating them into practical technical solutions and delivery plans.

name: Requirements Analysis
summary: Capturing, analysing and validating functional and non-functional requirements.

name: Service Transition
summary: Managing the movement of new technology into live operational environments while minimising disruption.

name: Process Design
summary: Designing efficient, repeatable operational processes that improve delivery quality and reduce manual effort.

name: Change Management
summary: Supporting organisations and end users through technology-driven business change.

name: Risk Management
summary: Identifying, assessing and mitigating delivery, technical and operational risks.

name: Technical Documentation
summary: Producing clear technical documentation, implementation guidance and operational procedures.

name: Academic Writing
summary: Producing structured research, technical reports and evidence-based academic publications.

name: Technical Writing
summary: Communicating complex technical concepts through clear, structured documentation.

name: Reporting
summary: Developing meaningful reports and dashboards that support operational and strategic decision-making.

name: Data Analysis
summary: Exploring, interpreting and communicating insights from complex datasets.

name: Data Modelling
summary: Designing structured analytical models that support reporting, governance and long-term maintainability.

name: Data Cleansing
summary: Improving data quality through validation, transformation and reconciliation techniques.

name: Software Architecture
summary: Designing maintainable software systems with clear separation of concerns and modular structure.

name: System Design
summary: Planning the structure, components and interactions of complex technical systems.

name: Research
summary: Investigating technical problems through structured enquiry, experimentation and critical evaluation.

name: Web UI Design
summary: Designing intuitive interfaces that present complex information clearly and effectively.

name: User Experience Design
summary: Creating user-centred digital experiences that balance usability, accessibility and functionality.

name: Power BI
summary: Developing analytical data models, interactive dashboards and operational reporting solutions using Microsoft Power BI.

name: Power Query
summary: Building reusable ETL processes and transformation pipelines for structured data preparation.

name: Project Reporting
summary: Creating structured project reports, dashboards and governance updates that communicate progress, risk, issues and delivery confidence.

name: Technical Leadership
summary: Providing technical direction, facilitating decision-making and aligning technology with organisational objectives.

name: Governance
summary: Establishing decision-making structures, controls and accountability to support successful project and programme delivery.

name: Strategic Planning
summary: Defining long-term objectives, delivery approaches and priorities that support organisational goals.

name: Data Architecture
summary: Designing structured data models, relationships and governance that support trusted reporting and decision-making.

name: Information Governance
summary: Managing information quality, ownership and controls to ensure data remains accurate, secure and fit for purpose.

name: Communications Planning
summary: Planning stakeholder communications that support engagement, understanding and successful organisational change.

name: Web Development
summary: Designing and building browser-based applications and interactive web experiences.

name: User Experience Design
summary: Creating intuitive, accessible and user-focused digital experiences that improve usability and engagement.

name: Ethical Risk Analysis
summary: Evaluating technical solutions to identify ethical considerations, misuse potential and opportunities for responsible design.

name: Test-Driven Development
summary: Applying test-first development practices to improve software quality and maintainability.

name: Agile Ceremonies
summary: Facilitating agile planning, reviews, retrospectives and stand-ups to support collaborative delivery.

name: Testing Coordination
summary: Planning and coordinating testing activities to validate solutions before operational deployment.

name: Facilitation
summary: Leading workshops and collaborative discussions to achieve shared understanding and informed decision-making.

name: Knowledge Management
summary: Capturing, organising and sharing organisational knowledge to improve consistency and continuous learning.

name: Incident Response Coordination
summary: Coordinating people, suppliers and technical teams during operational or cybersecurity incidents.

name: Technical Coordination
summary: Managing technical dependencies, delivery teams and implementation activities across complex projects.

name: Service Continuity Planning
summary: Planning and coordinating activities that maintain or rapidly restore critical business services during disruption.

name: Delivery Leadership
summary: Leading multidisciplinary teams to deliver complex programmes, projects and organisational change successfully.
